text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Phew... We're finally here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Riko Kashimoto and I decide to visit a hot spring
in order to take a break from work and wash away
some of our exhaustion.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I did some research about the health benefits of
the waters here, and apparently they're rather
excellent.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
This might be a good location to use for a team
training camp.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I know this was supposed to be a day trip, but
let's stay the night if they have any rooms
available.
choice_data_list: Oh, you want to extend our trip?

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Yes. The best way to check the quality and taste
of their meals is to try them ourselves.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
What a relief that we managed to get a room.
Both the food and hot spring were excellent.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I can't remember the last time I had a chance to
relax like this...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Though, to be frank, I never would've imagined
going on a trip like this with you.
choice_data_list: We sure make an odd pair, huh?

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Our ways of thinking are so different, from our
approach to training, to... well, everything else.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Yet despite our differences... or rather because of our differences, we're able to learn a lot from each other.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I'm always watching how you do things.
Remember that and keep up the good work, hm?

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
...Hehe. Now then, I'd like to hear what your plans
are for—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bzzzt, bzzzt, bzzzt.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Excuse me. I'm getting a call.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Bitter Glasse? What's the matter? ...Yes, I'll deal
with that tomorrow afternoon, as planned.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: What? Where am I right now? Well, um...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
N-no! I want to make it perfectly clear that we are
merely on a business trip as fellow trainers—

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Listen, stop making this out to be some sleepover
party or—hello? Bitter Glasse? Hello?!

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
We're returning to the academy first thing
tomorrow morning. Please be ready to depart as
quickly as possible.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, we leave the inn before the sun
rises... I've never seen her move so quickly.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
It's a shame there weren't any rooms available. I
suppose that's to be expected on such short
notice.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
At least we could enjoy the hot spring. It was
spacious, well laid out, and the floors were
nonslip.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I feel more confident and comfortable with
bringing my charges here now.
choice_data_list: You really care for your racers.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
But of course. You're the same way yourself,
aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I'll use any means and do everything in my power
to protect those two.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
And though I don't intend to compromise on my
approach, that doesn't mean I'll never
accommodate change.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I'm no more immune to change than anyone, just
like how Bitter Glasse and Little Cocon grow
every passing day.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I can't forge a path to the future for them unless I
expand my knowledge and improve myself.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: My methods aren't understood by many, but I will create a clear track for my runners to follow.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: ...That's what I believe the role of a trainer is.
choice_data_list: Let's both work hard for our students' sake.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Bold words for one who knows my standards of
"hard work."

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
But to be a trainer at Tracen Academy, that's the
sort of confidence you need.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Very well. I look forward to what the future holds
for you.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Now then, let's head back.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I need to put together a training camp plan for
my racers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We both think about our students as we hurry
back to the academy.
